title: Fix breakage in upstream CI
body: Alpine 3.12 seems to have renamed the `man` package - it no longer exists. Switch man-db, which I believe is the same thing.

comments.body:

Swapped from man-db (pulls down 20mb) to less (pulls down 6mb)
